title: GEO-Bench: Benchmarking Ranking Manipulation in Generative Engine Optimization
geo_relevance: Unified defensive benchmark for GEO ranking manipulation effectiveness and stealth
reason: Strongest new item found; standardizes black-box prompt attacks, white-box gradient attacks and white-hat C-SEO strategies under one protocol.
notes: Added as P025 and B010. Use as defensive/detectability resource due to dual-use risk.

title: Think Before Writing: Feature-Level Multi-Objective Optimization for Generative Citation Visibility

reason: Conceptually useful and aligned with citation absorption / feature engineering, but code and dataset release were not verified.
notes: Potential overlap with Structural Feature Engineering and GEO Citation Lab.

title: Structural Feature Engineering for Generative Engine Optimization: How Content Structure Shapes Citation Behavior
geo_relevance: Macro, meso and micro structure optimization for citation behavior
reason: Relevant to structural GEO, but likely overlaps with FeatGEO and GEO Citation Lab feature analysis.

title: AI Answer Engine Citation Behavior: An Empirical Analysis of the GEO16 Framework
geo_relevance: 16-pillar observational framework for AI answer engine citation behavior
reason: Practical B2B SaaS citation audit with 70 product-intent prompts, 1,702 citations and 1,100 unique URLs, but narrower than GEO Citation Lab.
notes: Could be useful for page-quality audit dimensions.

reason: Relevant to multimodal GEO, but should be compared against Pinterest VLM/GEO and multimodal ranker work.
notes: Potentially useful for vertical multimodal taxonomy.
